name: Cathe's Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potato into chunks and boil in water until quite done, a little over-done. You should end up with about a cup of water in the pot.
2. Mash the potato chunks with the water; this will be a juicy, mushy mixture.
3. Stir in spices, butter, and half-and-half; mix well.
4. Add paprika to taste (a teaspoon or so at a time) until the mixture thickens.
5. Stir in Tabasco sauce and serve.
Cathe's notes:
Varies a lot from time to time; might need to experiment.
